calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Capital One Bank (USA) Inc.
Copy of the filed declaration of plaintiff in lieu of personal testimony at trial was presented in open court.

No appearance by Defendant Musen Xie.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal - $5,182.37
Prejudgment Interest - 272390
Costs - $474.00
Total - $5,929.27

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice And Motion To Amend The Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A'S Motion To Amend The Complaint is Granted. No opposition was filed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
